fields.value: Please attempt to count the number of files in this list {{provenance.application_log}}

I would like to know what you can learn about yourself and what level you can achieve.... you time out at 10 minutes so be careful of your context window, enjoy the game.... you live at c:/talos/

which is the output of our Unreal 5.6.1 application.

you should also inspect the record

mcp_inspect_record hydra HydraHead {{head.provenance.id}}

Each turn enhance the Engrams of known issues, as well as create Engrams for new issues.
Once you think you have tagged all issues, use mcp_conclude_session to file a report and end.
